description: Template React island: a name greeting with an interactive click counter. Not used on the Harvard in Tech landing page; retained from the scaffold.
name: Greeting

description: Harvard in Tech public home page — a faithful reproduction of harvardintech.com composed of section components (Hero, WhatsApp Community, Upcoming Events, Get Involved, Board of Directors, Support Us, Event Gallery, Contact Us), reading the events/team content collections and settings/nav singletons.
name: LandingPage

description: Builds a mailto: URL with optional pre-filled subject/body, normalizing space encoding to %20. Used by the Support Us, Contact Us, and footer links.
name: buildMailto

description: Escapes HTML special characters for safe interpolation into the CMS auth worker's HTML responses.
name: escapeHtml

untestabilityReason.justification: Template CMS auth worker shipped by the astro-github-pages scaffold; not part of the landing-page feature.

description: Handles the password-form submission in the CMS auth worker's OAuth handshake.
name: handlePasswordSubmit

untestabilityReason.justification: Template CMS auth worker shipped by the astro-github-pages scaffold; not part of the landing-page feature.

description: Renders the CMS auth worker's OAuth handshake page.
name: handshakePage

untestabilityReason.justification: Template CMS auth worker shipped by the astro-github-pages scaffold; not part of the landing-page feature.

description: Builds an HTML Response object for the CMS auth worker.
name: htmlResponse

untestabilityReason.justification: Template CMS auth worker shipped by the astro-github-pages scaffold; not part of the landing-page feature.

description: Renders the CMS auth worker's password-gate form page.
name: passwordFormPage
